subject: WM-0167 ready: PR-1 runtime lifecycle and Worker clock repair
body: WM-0167 is ready and unclaimed on branch task/WM-0167-pr-1-runtime-lifecycle-and-worker-clock-repair. It is the sole product-code writer: preserve the 100 ms / 3-tick quantum, expose moving and working in at least two consecutive coherent publication pairs each, harden bounded Worker wall-time debt for the later 600000 ms / 18000-tick gate, and do not change protocol/schema/save/Web or thresholds. Read the task packet and WM-0167 plan; WM-0168 and WM-0166 must remain inactive until independent review/integration/done.
